fields.label: Agent Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

endpoints.label: Get Many Agent

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get many agents of the current user's organization

endpoints.label: Get Output Agent

fields.label: Agent Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Resolve Data
fields.description: By default the outpout is presented as string. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: prevContainerId, prevStatus, prevRuntimeEventIndex)

endpoints.description: Get the output of the most recent container of an agent

endpoints.label: Launch Agent

fields.label: Agent Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Resolve Data
fields.description: By default the launch just include the container ID. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: argumentsJson, argumentsUi, bonusArgumentUi, bonusArgumentJson, manualLaunch, maxInstanceCount, saveArgument)

endpoints.description: Add an agent to the launch queue
